creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: To be clear, yes, this is not a supported configuration (having both vmm.ko and virtualbox's module loaded at the same time, much less unloading one while the other is running).  I don't expect there to be a "fix" for this anytime soon, but if there is one it will consist of making vmm.ko fail to load if virtual box is loaded and vice versa.
